---
id: get-trait-values
title: "Query Trait Values"
description: "Batch query the current values of specified traits."
sidebar_label: "Query Trait Values"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"
info_path: versioned_docs/version-Beta/aqara-developer/aiot-api/aiot-api

---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Query Trait Values"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/devices/trait/read"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Batch query the current values of specified traits.

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={[{"name":"Accesstoken","in":"header","required":false,"schema":{"type":"string","example":"{{Accesstoken}}"},"description":"Access token obtained via authorization."},{"name":"Appid","in":"header","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string","example":"{{Appid}}"},"description":"App ID assigned when creating an application on the [Aqara Developer Platform](https://developer.aqara.com)."},{"name":"Keyid","in":"header","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string","example":"{{Keyid}}"},"description":"Key ID assigned when creating an application on the [Aqara Developer Platform](https://developer.aqara.com)."},{"name":"Nonce","in":"header","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string","example":"{{Nonce}}"},"description":"Random string, should be different for each request."},{"name":"Time","in":"header","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string","example":"{{Time}}"},"description":"Request timestamp in milliseconds."},{"name":"Sign","in":"header","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string","example":"{{Sign}}"},"description":"Request signature. For information on how to generate the signature, please refer to [Sign Generation Rules](https://opendoc.aqara.com/en/docs/developmanual/apiIntroduction/signGenerationRules.html)."},{"name":"Lang","in":"header","required":false,"schema":{"type":"string","enum":["zh","en"],"example":"en"},"description":"Language, defaults to English. Supports 'zh' and 'en'."}]}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={{"required":true,"content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"data":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","required":["deviceId","endpointId","functionCode","traitCodes"],"properties":{"deviceId":{"type":"string","description":"Device ID"},"endpointId":{"type":"integer","description":"Endpoint ID"},"functionCode":{"type":"string","description":"Function code"},"traitCodes":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"string"},"description":"List of trait codes to be queried"}},"title":"TraitValueQuery"}}},"title":"TraitReadRequest"},"examples":{"readTraits":{"value":{"data":[{"deviceId":"123456","endpointId":1,"functionCode":"Output","traitCodes":["OnOff"]}]}}}}}}}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}

The type is consistent with the parameter.type of the trait.","oneOf":[{"type":"boolean"},{"type":"integer"},{"type":"number","format":"double"},{"type":"string"}],"title":"FlexibleValue"},"time":{"type":"integer","format":"int64","description":"Value update time (UTC timestamp in milliseconds)"}},"title":"TraitValueResult"}}}}],"example":{"type":"GetTraitValueResponse","version":"v4","msgId":"a1b2c3d4-e5f6-7890-abcd-00000000000d","code":0,"message":"success","data":[{"deviceId":"device-001","endpointId":1,"functionCode":"Output","traitCode":"OnOff","value":true,"time":1710001234567}]},"title":"TraitValueResponse"},"examples":{"traitValueSuccess":{"value":{"type":"GetTraitValueResponse","version":"v4","msgId":"2df2f431-a58d-4fdb-b39c-4f0d29e7ecf8","code":0,"message":"success","data":[{"deviceId":"123456","endpointId":1,"functionCode":"Output","traitCode":"OnOff","value":true,"time":1710001234567}]}}}}}},"400":{"description":"Request Parameter Error","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"example":{"type":"ErrorMessage","version":"v4","msgId":"a1b2c3d4-e5f6-7890-abcd-err000000001","code":400,"message":"Parameter xxx cannot be empty"},"description":"Error response.
